headlines.title: GIRL CAUSES ARREST OF SMUGGLER GANG
headlines.subtitle: Use of Stolen Boat Leads to Arrest of Fisherman, but Girl Finds Evidence That Brings About His Acquittal.

headlines.title: WILL BEGIN AUDIT OF ACCOUNTS OF THE WATER DEPARTMENT
headlines.subtitle: Local Firm Will Start Work on Special Audit Next Monday Morning; Cost Will Be Be- tween $500 and $600.

headlines.title: CUSTODY OF $1,000.000 CAUSES CLERK TO WORRY
headlines.subtitle: Given Big Batch of Bonds to Keep Over Night; Dog Is Trained to Do the Work of Burglars and Does It Well.

headlines.title: COMMISSIONERS DECIDE ACTION TUESDAY MORNING
headlines.subtitle: Commissioner Blanke Is Suc- cessful in His Efforts to Have Special Audit Made of Ac- counts of Water Department.

headlines.title: CITY PREPARES TO PROTECT WATER PLANT
headlines.subtitle: City Engineer Is Ordered by the City Commission to Prepare Plans and Estimates of the Cost of Levees Around the Holly Plant.

headlines.title: OFFICIALS INSPECT DAMAGE TO ROADS
headlines.subtitle: Immediate Steps Will Be Taken to Repair Washed-Out Sec- tions of County Pikes; Azle Road Withstands Floods.

headlines.title: Y. M. B. L. WILL CONSIDER PIPE LINE FRANCHISE OVER SPILLWAY TODAY
AD CLUB WILL CONSIDER PROBLEM TAX SUBJECTS
COMMITTEE WILL PASS ON W. P. LANE'S PROTEST
HARVARD STUDENT IS HOME FROM EUROPE
YOUNG MAN CHARGED WITH THEFT OF HORSE
NEWS RECEIVED OF THE DEATH OF W. R. MOORE
